title: News | Rt Hon Sir Andrew Mitchell MP
text_excerpt: News | Rt Hon Sir Andrew Mitchell MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Andrew News In Parliament Royal Sutton Coldfield Gallery Contact Visiting Parliament What your MP can do for you Toggle navigation Main navigation Home About Andrew News In Parliament Royal Sutton Coldfield Gallery Contact News Image Proud to cut the ribbon and officially open Harvey Norman 24 April 2026 Today local MP Sir Andrew Mitchell and former West Midlands Mayor Sir Andy Street officially opened the new Harvey Norman store in our town centre. Image Backing Sutton United to win promotion 24 April 2026 Yesterday Sir Andrew Mitchell visited Sutton United Football Club in Coleshill Road alongside Reddicap councillor Richard Parkin, ahead of the club’s much anticipated play-off semi-final this weekend at home against Heather St Johns FC. Weekly Message to Constituents 315 - A new era for our town centre 24 April 2026 Today it was my great pleasure to join our former West Midlands Mayor Sir Andy Street to officially open the new Harvey Norman store in our town centre. Weekly Message to Constituents 314 - Frustration as development gets go-ahead despite campaign 17 April 2026 Unwanted Wishaw battery plan gets the green light despite community opposition. Image Tackling offroad bike menace 17 April 2026 Sir Andrew Mitchell recently welcomed local resident Lee Bashford to his advice surgery who has raised concerns about off-road motorbikes on The Greenway and surrounding area. Image Opening new estate agents in our town 17 April 2026 Local MP Sir Andrew Mitchell had the pleasure of performing the official opening of Wilkins Estate Agents in Mere Green - one of the most recent investments into the Mere Green local economy. Image A welcome boost for local healthcare: opening Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill 10 April 2026 Sir Andrew Mitchell officially opened the brand new Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill Surgery – a welcome addition to Sutton Coldfield’s healthcare services. Weekly Message to Constituents 313 - A welcome boost for local healthcare 10 April 2026 This week I had a wonderful time officially opening the brand new Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill Surgery – a welcome addition to Sutton Coldfield’s healthcare services. Image Sutton metals firm restores historic war memorial 10 April 2026 Sir Andrew Mitchell visited Beaver Metals to see the magnificent war memorial from the former Birmingham Mint, which the company have beautifully restored for posterity.
